report.author: Ahmed Marwan
report.comment: I don't like how the button looks on the form find another color for it @Ahmed Marwan
report.rationale: Comment says he dislikes the current button color and wants 'another color' with no target specified, which requires a design judgment call rather than a deterministic swap.

report.author: Ahmed Marwan
report.rationale: The comment only says "this one too" with no actual instruction attached, so there's no deterministic edit or creative direction to extract.
report.reply: I wasn't sure what you meant by "this one too" here — could you say which element or change you're pointing at? I didn't want to guess and edit the wrong layer.

report.author: Ahmed Marwan
report.rationale: "Private testing" doesn't fit this dining/brand-intro section and reads like a likely typo for "Private Tasting", so I shouldn't guess at the copy change.
report.reply: Quick check before I touch this — did you mean "Private Tasting" for the Interior Image caption? "Private testing" doesn't quite land next to the dining copy, so I want to confirm the wording before I swap it in.
